description: Features Shoulder bag is made of high-quality PU leather, soft and comfortable to the touch, durable. Smooth metal zippers and high-quality hardware add texture to the details. This bag comes with adjustable shoulder straps, allowing you to use it as a shoulder bag or a crossbody bag. You can freely adjust the wearing method according to your needs. French style design, simple solid color contains the atmosphere of retro, comfort and fashion, easily shaping your temperament, never fading. This casual bag is not only a fashion accessory, but also a must-have for your travel. The shoulder bag is suitable for any occasion from shopping and parties to travel and casual gatherings, and can be matched with all the clothes in your wardrobe. The fashionable crossbody bag is a perfect gift for women on Christmas, Valentine's Day, birthday parties, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving anniversaries, etc. Product Specification Material: PU leather, Polyester Colour: Black, Pink Size: 21 x 12 x 6 cm Package Includes: 1 x Cross Body Bag Women
